title: Siege Stopper
description: A Mod to prevent zombie sieges from happening in your minecraft world.
body:
# Siege Stopper

This Mod prevents the annoying mechanic of Zombie Sieges in Minecraft.
 
If a player is near or in a village around midnight, there is a 10% chance that the game will spawn a zombie siege near the village, regardless of the light level. This Mod detects the siege Event and cancels it proactive.

## Note

This Mod is an 1.20+ update for the Mod [Village Siege Disabler [Forge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/village-siege-disabler) as it seems to be little to no longer maintained.

I won't continue Forge Support and concentrate on Neoforged. A port to Fabric will not exist from my side, because I don't play Fabric. Feel free to use the code though.
